source: thefoodcrawl.com /api/creator/mark-wiens (AI transcript extraction; coords via Google Places)
note: net-new vs wiensmap: restaurants Mark Wiens featured on YouTube that wiensmap.com hasn't mapped

restaurants.name: Chan Sun Kee
restaurants.video_title: Garlic Crab Mountain!! 🦀 INSANE SEAFOOD in Hong Kong!! (Typhoon Shelter Crab)
